ksa_text: Define the enterprise AI acceptable use policy, prohibited use categories, and human oversight requirements for AI-assisted decision making.

dcwf.top_element_label: Collaborate with customer to define information requirements.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of appropriate use policies and procedures

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AG-T-004 (AI Governance/Task) excluded: out_of_scope: 0 core signals, 0 OOS signals, composite 0.462. Highest framework: NIST AI RMF at 0.462.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope scope, AI Governance, composite 0.462. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge exclusion of AI Governance (composite 0.462)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: AI Governance at ~12% market presence. AI governance ownership is not a standard ATE requirement at IC/senior IC. Exclusion consistent with role-level scope.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
